item.title: Lisdo 0.1.2
item.description:
### Lisdo v0.1.2 macOS beta.
This patch refreshes the Mac toolbar treatment for newer macOS releases.
- Removed the gray shared toolbar backing behind the top-right Search, Filters, Quick Capture, and Settings controls on macOS 26. - Kept the controls in the native macOS toolbar so search, filtering, quick capture, settings, keyboard shortcuts, and popovers keep their existing behavior. - Preserved the calm monochrome Mac shell without changing the draft review, capture, provider, or sync flows.
AI output remains draft-first. Review and save a draft before it becomes a todo. Provider secrets remain in Keychain or local Mac settings and are not written to CloudKit records.
Download the DMG asset from this release, open it, and drag Lisdo to Applications.
----------
这个 patch 版本继续打磨新版 macOS 上的 Mac toolbar 视觉表现。
- 移除了 macOS 26 中顶部右侧 Search、Filters、Quick Capture、Settings 控件后面的灰色共享 toolbar 底框。 - 这些控件仍然保留在原生 macOS toolbar 中，所以 search、filter、quick capture、settings、快捷键和 popover 行为保持不变。 - 继续保持安静、单色的 Mac app 外壳，不改变 draft review、capture、provider 或 sync 流程。
AI 输出始终先进入 draft。用户审核并保存后，draft 才会变成正式 todo。Provider secrets 根据类型保存在 Keychain 或本机设置中，不写入 CloudKit records。
下载本 release 中的 DMG 文件，打开后把 Lisdo 拖到 Applications 即可安装。
